name: cole
desc: A gentle young man in his late twenties: the village lamplighter. Neat black hair in an undercut swept back, curious dark brown eyes, warm friendly features, a calm kind manner. He wears a dark-teal asymmetric shoulder-cape clasped at one shoulder with a small brass flame-shaped pin, over a cream band-collar shirt, with a single leather strap across his chest holding a slim brass wick-case.
sheetHint: same face, black undercut swept back, dark-teal shoulder-cape with brass flame pin, cream band-collar shirt, chest strap with brass wick-case

expressions.happy: a bright open smile, eyes lit up
expressions.worried: brows knit, small anxious frown, eyes glancing aside
expressions.determined: firm set jaw, focused eyes, faint confident smirk
expressions.tender: soft eyes, small warm smile, head fractionally tilted — the look of giving someone their name back
